sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49223" key="qruli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρυλ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n49223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a false note,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">488</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρυαλ-</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
